entry.title: Re: Sap Analytics Cloud (SAC) - Show filter variable defi...
entry.content: sorry for not mentioning clearly. You need to create Transaction Currency input parameter in fact view and not in Analytical model and then finally create calculated column like I mentioned earlier.

entry.title: Professional Services：Cost Recognition for Periodic Service (SPPC) question
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client's service contract uses recognition code SPPC. The client has a question: assuming the contract period is from January 2025 to December 2025, if there is an unplanned temporary expense in May, they want to recognize the entire expense in May's cost, reflecting an unexpected loss in the contract for that month, rather than spreading it over the contract period. Is there a feasible way to do this?   

 

Best regards
Lance

entry.title: Re: Open Excel File from PAPM Cloud in Analysis for Office
entry.content:
Hi Daniela, There is no native functionality available in PaPM cloud. However you can follow this blog to get some reference for your requirement.

https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-papm-cloud-integration-with-microsoft-excel/ba-p/13568106

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: Re: Limit purchase order (new purchase order type)
entry.content:
I

would like to clarify which account suitable for me;1) Enterprise account2) Standard account. i have total 180 document PO for invoice processing per month. Any transaction limit for Standard account ?

entry.title: How to deploy extended standard legacy Fiori apps in BAS ?
entry.content:
Hello I am trying to extend the standard Fiori app F2023 using fiori adaptation project generator in BAS wich says i need to make an extention project instead.

So i do that i extend the intended views and controllers and it all works localy, but when i want to deploy it the wizard asks me to make a new fiori app and a new tile instead of extending the standard app.

And even then when i go for it the deployed application is not working as i get a blank screen and error in console: 

cannot read property of "content" in index.html

or 

Error in app component zeam_malf_mans1: No descriptor was found

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: C_TS4FI_2023 and C_S4CFI_2408
entry.content:
I recently passed the C_TS4FI_2023 certification, and I found it to be a great way to validate my knowledge of SAP S/4HANA Financial Accounting. My main reason for pursuing this certification was to enhance my expertise in financial processes and improve my career prospects in SAP finance roles.

When comparing C_TS4FI_2023 and C_S4CFI_2408, the key difference lies in the implementation focus. C_TS4FI_2023 covers core financial accounting in an on-premise environment, while C_S4CFI_2408 is tailored for cloud-based implementations. If you're looking to specialize in traditional SAP finance, C_TS4FI_2023 might be a better fit, whereas C_S4CFI_2408 is ideal for professionals working with SAP Cloud solutions.

To prepare, I used P2PCerts for practice questions and study materials. Their resources were extremely helpful, providing real exam-like questions that made it easier to understand complex topics. Passing this certification has significantly boosted my job opportunities and made me more competitive in the SAP job market.
My resource was: https://www.p2pcerts.com/

entry.title: Re: Update PMR item Status with in EWM during consumption...
entry.content: Hi naresh_kudipudi13 - Did you try to stop via interface debugging (Proces- QueueDeregister... Stopping...etc) ...I am believe this is function module would give you desire things which you are looking. Before conclude debug once. Thanks! Kind Regards, Ajit

entry.title: Is linked analysis possible in Optimized mode SAC Live model ?
entry.content: I am getting the option greyed out when trying to do a linked analysis. We have a S4HANA live data model. Any pointers will be helpful

entry.title: Re: Key areas of change in C_TS4FI_2023 SAP S/4HANA Financials
entry.content: The C_TS4FI_2023 SAP S/4HANA Financials certification has introduced several key updates, aligning with the latest advancements in SAP financial processes. The exam now places greater emphasis on Universal Journal Enhancements, Financial Closing Automation, and Embedded Analytics for Real-Time Reporting, reflecting SAP’s shift toward intelligent finance. Additionally, there’s an increased focus on Accounts Payable and Receivable Optimization, ensuring candidates understand streamlined processes in SAP S/4HANA. To effectively prepare for these changes, P2PCerts.com provides up-to-date study materials and practice exams, helping candidates master the latest topics with real exam-like questions. These updates make it crucial to stay informed and practice with reliable resources to ensure success in the certification exam.

entry.title: Re: Update PMR item Status with in EWM during consumption posting
entry.content:
Hi Ajit, 

You are right. I stopped the queue and debugged to see that this fm creates and updates PMR document based on the changes made on Processing order either create or change. However, it appears to me that parameters at item level doesn’t contain the status field and its value or deletion indicator field XLOEK to update. Most of the blogs points to say that this kind of updates needs to be flown from s4 end from PO but shouldn’t be directly be done in EWM. As I mentioned I have the alternative to update custom fields and use them for staging. We are trying to avoid that by changing the standard fields so that the standard behavior of staging will drop those PMR lines for further selection. Hope to see if any one had similar experience..

Thanks for your support so far..

Naresh k

entry.title: Is MB5B used in S4 Hana?
entry.content:
Hello,

  Can you tell me if Tcode MB5B was discontinued in S4 Hana.  My company did an upgrade last year and now the data is not updating since the upgrade?  I checked the Tcode comparisions from SAP to S4 Hana and I didn't find MB5B listed as a different Tcode in S4 Hana.  The IT group is telling me it is no longer used in S4 Hana.  Any help is appreciated.

Thank you

Sean

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Plan Delivery Time for Purchase requisition i...
entry.content:
The Planned delivery time is a fixed value in MRP2 View of material master data or in PIR, so if you want to Variant configuration characteristics value to calculate, you should customize a program and logic to change this filed before running MRP.

Material master data:

PIR:

entry.title: Re: How to set the BOM to Change Master Required when cre...
entry.content:
To make the Change Master mandatory for BOM creation and modification:

1. Path to Configuration:
Navigate to the SAP Fiori Launchpad.
Open the Manage BOM Settings application.
In the SCM_BOM section, locate the setting for "Change Master Required."
Enable this setting for the relevant BOM types you are working with.

2. Verify Configuration:
Ensure that the Change Master settings are correctly configured and activated for the necessary BOM types. Check that the required change numbers are assigned to the BOM and that you’re using the correct change number during creation or modification.

reference docu:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/be1f26557c9d40338a721b95829569f6/8307c453f57eb44ce10000000a174cb4.html?version=6.03.latest

entry.title: Re: Cascading Budget and Planner Hierarchy
entry.content: @pbrandi Yes it also works with rollup, had it confirmed by our Product Manager today.

entry.title: Re: Budget hold back in Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hi @vinkamath 

As far as I know there is no holdback option with any kind of budget in Variable Pay. You would need to look at maybe creating a 2nd budget box if that even works.

Budgets in Variable Pay work in a very specific way and custom field logic will not give you the same exact results than in Compensation.

Please see this recent other thread here: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-q-a/variable-pay-budget-calculation/qaq-p/14019820

and links that I shared with Olga including one to a page with very detailled explanation of every single type of budget possible.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: how to stop migration cockpit long time running job
entry.content: during the project implementation, the data deletion action is sensitive, here I would propose to raise the oss ticket to SAP company for further deletion action.

entry.title: Re: Prototype Design Pattern in SAP OOABAP
entry.content:
Hi @Jelena_Perfiljeva 
Thank you for your honest feedback! I understand that the example might not have clearly conveyed the real-world applicability of the Prototype Pattern in SAP.

The key purpose of this pattern is to efficiently create object copies when instantiating them from scratch is costly. A practical SAP example would be duplicating business objects in SAP RAP or BOPF. For instance, in a procurement scenario, if a purchase order needs to be replicated with slight modifications (e.g., different vendor terms or adjusted quantities), cloning an existing object allows us to retain most attributes while modifying only specific fields. This avoids redundant object creation and unnecessary database reads.

Regarding the coding style, I agree that cl_demo_output=>display is a better approach for output, and I’ll review Clean ABAP guidelines to refine the implementation. Also, you’re right—just "ABAP" is sufficient. I appreciate the attention to detail!

I’ll consider updating the blog with a more SAP-relevant example to make the pattern’s benefits clearer. Thanks again for your valuable input!

entry.title: Re: Local Client copy error - CL_MDG_TR_CC, CL_FINB_TR_CC
entry.content: how did you resolve this issue? im getting the same error on my new system.

entry.title: Re: Hyper-V virtualization is not supported for SAP syste...
entry.content:
Hi Sitlesh,

1. Microsoft Hyper-V supports Microsoft OS. Linux is not supported with Hyper-V on-premises but is supported with the Azure Cloud environment.

2. You can migrate all your SAP systems to Microsoft Windows servers using MS SQL or any database or go for Cloud solutions.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: how do we automate space & org members access in SAP...
entry.content: Hi Tong, in CLI i could see an option to add one user to one space. Is there an option/cmd to add a user to all the available space at a time?

entry.title: Re: Mass Update of Max Stock Level from Excel File Using MM46 in SAP S/4HANA Retail
entry.content:
Hello,

​In SAP Fiori, the equivalent functionality to the classic SAP GUI transaction MM46 (Mass Maintenance for Article Master Data) is provided by the "Mass Maintenance" app. This app enables users to update multiple master data records simultaneously and can be accessed via the "Start Mass Maintenance" and "Manage Mass Maintenance" tiles in the Fiori launchpad.

SAP Reference:
https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2505')/S15OP

Best Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Re: End - to - End Guide for using Multi-Select Position Generic Object on Job Requisition
entry.content:
Hi @NadiaZapata,

As this solution work for any no of hiring but in case of 1300 position it will be hard to recruitment team to select the all those particular position and taking offer approval one by one which will become a long process 
So if for this much of hiring better to go with Evergreen Requisition kind of Hiring 

Regards,
Arun Singh

entry.title: Re: SQL Trace (ST05): Enhancements to the SAP HANA Plan Visualizer
entry.content:
Thank you Adrian for sharing this detailed blog!

I have a question to the general usage of ST05, do you know if ST05 has the ability to trace SQL query on custom Z_view in $TMP package?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: End - to - End Guide for using Multi-Select Position Generic Object on Job Requisition
entry.content:
Hi @steffiedsa2 

Usually this solution is for the same kind of position, having the same attributes of position 
As if you looking for the different location then in this case we also have to make location object Multiselect where we can select multiple location and also with that we have make offer detail templated as per the countries pay structure As if different country them Pay grade and paycomponent could be different

So this kind of case is possible to achieve but it need a proper configuration with keeping all the scenarios and recruitment process  

Regards,
Arun Singh

entry.title: Re: TPM15M for long-term contracts
entry.content: Hi, which note that you found saying that :" the transfer between accounting accounts occurs only for movements that impact the position"? I am facing the same issue where the TPM15M transfer nominal amount from LT to ST valuation class but didn't generate any accounting. Some posts suggested to use TPM1, creating a new position procedure for current portion transfer instead of using TPM15M. Please share your findings if you are able to resolve your issue. Thank you.

entry.title: onInit hook is not executing from controller
entry.content:
I have created the below js Controller with the name PDMDocumentListActions.controller.js in ext/controller folder in app folder.
Fiori element generated through the Fiori application generator in vs code

 

sap.ui.define(
  ['sap/m/MessageToast', 'sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel', 'sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller'],
  function (MessageToast, JSONModel, Controller) {
    'use strict';

    return Controller.extend('router.ext.controller.PDMDocumentListActions', {
      onDeactivateDocument: function (oEvent) {
        var oModel = this.getView().getModel();
        var sPath = oEvent.getSource().getBindingContext().getPath();

        // Call CAP backend action
        oModel.callFunction('/deactivateDocument', {
          method: 'POST',
          urlParameters: {
            docId: oModel.getProperty(sPath + '/docId')
          },
          success: function () {
            MessageToast.show('Document deactivated successfully.');
            oModel.refresh();
          },
          error: function (oError) {
            MessageToast.show('Error deactivating document.');
          }
        });
      },

      onGetDocumentByDocId: function () {
        MessageToast.show('Custom handler invoked.');
      },

      onInit: function () {
        console.log('PDMDcoumentListActions controller initialized.');
        var oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel();
        var that = this;

        //Fetch user roles from backend service
        oModel.callFunction('/getUserRoles', {
          method: 'GET',
          success: function (oData) {
            console.log('User roles fetched successfully', oData + ' ' + oData.value);
            that._setButtonVisibility(oData.value);
          },
          error: function (oError) {
            console.error('Error fetching user roles', oError);
          }
        });
      },

      _setButtonVisibility: function (aRoles) {
        var isEntityManager = aRoles.includes('EntityManager');

        var oUIModel = new JSONModel({
          showActions: isEntityManager
        });

        this.getView().setModel(oUIModel, 'ui');
      }
    });
  }
);

 

In manifest.json , I have added the below content in"sap.ui5"

 

 "extends": {
      "extensions": {
        "sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
          "sap.fe.templates.ListReport.ListReportController": {
            "controllerName": "router.ext.controller.PDMDocumentListActions"
          }
        }
      }
    }

 

 These are the below action added in manifest.json

 

 "content": {
                "header": {
                  "actions": {
                    "getDocumentByDocId": {
                      "id": "getDocumentByDocId",
                      "press": "router.ext.controller.PDMDocumentListActions.onGetDocumentByDocId",
                      "visible": "{ui>/showActions}",
                      "enabled": true,
                      "text": "Get Document"
                    },
                    "deactivateDocument": {
                      "id": "deactivateDocument",
                      "press": "router.ext.controller.PDMDocumentListActions.onDeactivateDocument",
                      "visible": "{ui>/showActions}",
                      "enabled": true,
                      "text": "Deactivate Document"
                    }
                  }
                }
              }

 

 The below is the controller handler in cap Java,

 

package customer.poc_ams_policy.handlers;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;

import com.sap.cds.services.handler.EventHandler;
import com.sap.cds.services.handler.annotations.On;
import com.sap.cds.services.handler.annotations.ServiceName;
import com.sap.cds.services.request.UserInfo;

import cds.gen.documentservice.GetUserRolesContext;

@Component
@ServiceName("DocumentService")
public class UserRoleHandler implements EventHandler {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(UserRoleHandler.class);

    @On(event = "getUserRoles")
    public void getUserRoles(GetUserRolesContext context) {
        UserInfo userInfo = context.getUserInfo();
        List<String> roles = userInfo.getRoles().stream().collect(Collectors.toList());
        logger.info("User roles: {}", roles);
        context.setResult(roles);
    }

}

 

Please let me know where I went wrong in above code even first line 

console.log('PDMDcoumentListActions controller initialized.'); of onInit also not printing.

error:
Log-dbg.js:497  [FUTURE FATAL] sap.fe.templates.ListReport.ListReportController: The registered Event Listener 'onInit' must not have a return value. -

entry.title: Entry is not a valid supply chain unit (/SCWM/SHP_RCV)

entry.title: Re: How to deploy extended standard legacy Fiori apps in...
entry.content:
Hi Ayoub,

The standard app F2023 is a Transactional application and not built on SAP Fiori Elements. Therefore, it's expected that the wizard suggests creating an Extension Project instead of an Adaptation Project for modifications.

Yes, we should deploy it to the ABAP repository using a different name, typically starting with Z or Y to distinguish it as a custom object. The namespace is automatically assigned as: customer.<project_name>

After deployment, create a custom tile and ensure that the target mapping ID matches the ID specified in the Component.js file of the custom app in BAS.

*zreportrepair-custom name given to project.

entry.title: Re: Fiori tile in BTP for a custom TCode in on-premise sy...
entry.content:
Please refer below for the steps to be followed.

You can refer this.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi everyone, myself Vignesh Avasarala from Chennai, Tamilnadu, India. Happy to be joining the SAP Community! 😀💟

entry.title: Re: ABAP AUTHORITY CHECK Explained: A Practical Guide with Real-World Example
entry.content:
Hi Community,

 

  • Object class: it is a container for authorization objects  
  • Authorization object: object to check authorization 
  • Authorization field: an authorization object has the authorization field which is used to define field values 



Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: Hi everyone, myself Vignesh Avasarala from Chennai, Tamilnadu, India. Happy to be joining the SAP Community! 😀♥️

entry.title: Re: How to Update & COMMIT in the Action without using 'c...
entry.content:
If it is a new App then the Managed application is recommended without CUD.

You can create an action and create RFC wrapper FM to put code for sending email and PO update FM like BAPI. You can use COMMIT WORK inside that.

Call the FM with DESTINATION 'NONE' which will not break anything in RAP framework.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi everyone, myself Vignesh Avasarala from Chennai, Tamilnadu, India. Happy to be joining the SAP Community! 😀♥️

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: Internal (Customs) Compliance Programs – The What, Why and How
entry.content:
What are they?

 

Let’s start with the basics: Internal (Customs) Compliance Programs are a set of internal policies and procedures designed to ensure compliance with export control regulations. There is no blueprint, so the system should be tailored to each company.

 

Why should companies care?

 

Internal (Customs) Compliance Programs are recommended by the European Union, USA, China, Japan, India, Australia & many more other countries to address risks such as:

Some EU Member States even require exporter to have an Internal Export Compliance Programs in place before they will issue a global exporter license. In Japan, the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry publishes the companies that have registered their programs.

But, in addition to help mitigate risks, there are also additional advantages to having these programs in place.

These advantages can be split into 2 main categories:

  • Macro benefits at a higher – global – level sort of say, that help build a more sustainable world:

 

  • Micro benefits – that directly profits the company itself:
    • Mapping an efficient export flow
    • Obtaining knowledge and control of the end user’s nature and activities
    • Complying with export control legislation
    • Reducing the risk of penalties by having risk controls in play
    • Minimising the risk of involvement in unauthorised exports and/or proliferation practices
    • Avoiding being entered on a list of targeted entities by some bodies and authorities
    • Raising the awareness of members of staff
    • Protect corporate reputation
    • Obtain a global export authorisation

 

What does the program look like?

 

Since a picture is worth a thousand words (and in this case maybe a few more!), I thought it might be easier to simply depict a summary of the various program areas:

 

Now, for the main question: how to implement it?

 

In today’s short blog, I wanted to invite an expert in the domain to offer their insights on best practices in terms of Internal Compliance Programs. I was very fortunate that Kevin Shakespeare – Director Professional Practices at the Chartered Institute of Export & International Trade agreed share his expertise on the matter.

 

What is the Chartered Institute of Export & International Trade?

 

The Chartered Institute of Export & International Trade’s purpose is to empower organisations and equip individuals with the expertise to trade effectively, sustainably and competitively.

Established in 1935, the Chartered Institute is trusted by governments, businesses and trade professionals around the world as the leading experts in international trade and the foremost association of exporters and importers.

It is committed to professionalising trade through education and training, while partnering with national and international partners to facilitate the acknowledged mutual benefits of free, frictionless and legitimate trade.

 

From your experience, where would you recommend companies start, and progress to implement an effective program?

 

Starting the process:

The process should start with the following actions and internal reviews

  • Know your customer and know your product
  • Understanding end use / end user, and understanding risk of diversion
  • Understanding where companies in the supply chain are established
  • Carry out a gap analysis and risk analysis
  • Ensure the company has an understanding of controlled goods
  • Ensure the company know the regulations that apply to their products and services and the countries that they trade with

All internal stakeholders should be involved in the planning process and companies should ensure that all team members are qualified and trained to a sufficient level of competence. 

 

Practical implementation and understanding

The company should understand the following and ensure that procedures are clearly documented and applied.

  • Denied party screening and sanctions compliance
  • Trans-shipment licenses
  • Understand the receiving countries licensing rules
  • Post movements requirements (OGEL)
  • Clear document audit trail
  • Creating and maintaining Export controls / customs compliance policies
  • Sub-contractor awareness / supply chain visibility
  • Extra territorial jurisdictions
  • Classification for customs and export controls
  • Clear internal audit and reporting (voluntary disclosures) process
  • Digital supply chain checks where possible
  • Objectives on what the Internal Compliance programme should achieve and how the standards will be maintained

 

Security requirements

The company should ensure the following security requirements are in place and ensure that procedures are clearly document and applied.

  • Security policies for employees
  • Secure software and cloud storage locations
  • Sufficient security clearance for employees

 

How can the Chartered Institute of Export & International Trade help companies achieve their objectives in this area?

 

There are a number of ways in which the Chartered Institute of Export and International Trade can provide support, for example:

  • Company health checks on existing internal compliance progress, aligned with an analysis of existing processes  
  • Advisory services including assistance in developing, implementing, and delivering the internal programs necessary for an Internal Compliance Programme
  • Support for classifying your goods
  • Knowledge sharing
  • Regular information bulletins
  • Provision of a Regulatory calendar
  • Training programmes; public training courses and courses specific to your company
  • Applications for export licenses and customs authorisations
  • Professional and Regulated Qualifications
  • Professional member communities in Export Controls and in Customs, including special interest groups and networking opportunities
  • Authorised Economic Operator status

In the (translated) words of Lao Tzu: “Anticipate the difficult by managing the easy”. So, should you want to anticipate and stay ahead in the ever-changing world of international trade and keep up with the latest trade news and announcements, I would suggest easilly subscribing to the Chartered Institute of Export & International Trade updates!

What about you, is your company looking into Internal Compliance Programs? I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

entry.title: Re: SFTP adapter - how to handle errors within processing a file
entry.content:
Hi @jirifridrich ,

Nice idea for handling retries, but what about using JMS Queue instead of custom design.

entry.title: Missing Table Analysis in DVM Reports
entry.content:
Our weekly DVM Reports are generating automatically with no issues, but a new table analysis I created is not included. The Age of Records determination for DBTABLOG (for sid E01) shows a green job status in Table Analysis Administration, but is absent from the DVM reports. What am I missing to get this new analysis included?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Missing Table Analysis in DVM Reports
entry.content:
Hi *,

It is normal behavior, as Table Analysis Administration and DVM Session (DVM reports) are 2 different functions.
-->"Auto DVM Session", which can analyze some pre-defined tables, and you can also try to analyze a table separately by manually creating a DVM session in SM_WORKCENTER -> Data Volume Management -> Service Sessions.

-->"Table Analysis Administration", which is commonly used for "Data Allocation Statistics" in SM_WORKCENTER -> Data Volume Management.

You can refer to the portal guide of Data Volume Management for "Table Analysis Administration"

Table Analysis Administration - Data Volume Management | SAP Help Portal

Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: #CoE#LA. Direct transfer data from SAP ECC source system using communication arrangement to connect?
entry.content: How to direct transfer data from SAP ECC source system using a communication arrangement to connect? Is there any step by step guidance?

entry.title: Re: DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB SAPLCKMS...
entry.content:
To resolve the DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR during CKMLCP posting, consider the following steps:

  1. Check SAP Notes: Review the following SAP Notes specifically related to this issue:

    • 2473645
    • 2772534
    • 2682969 [1]

  2. Analyze the error: The error occurs during COMMIT WORK processing when trying to insert a record into the CKMLPP table that already exists

  3. Possible solutions:

    • Ensure that the Open SQL array insert is only used when you are certain no duplicate records exist in the database
    • Implement exception handling for CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB during COMMIT WORK processing
    • If the error occurs in an unmodified SAP program, search the SAP Notes system using keywords: "DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR", "CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB", "SAPLCKMS", "LCKMSU33", "CKMS_BUFFER_POST_DYN"

  4. Prevent SQL Injection:

    • Use static open SQL statements where possible
    • If dynamic SQL is necessary, use class CL_ABAP_DYN_PRG to implement input checks and escape the input for dynamic clauses [2]

  5. Consult SAP administrator: If the issue persists, involve your SAP administrator for further investigation and potential system-specific solutions

Remember to document the actions and entries that caused the error to aid in troubleshooting and prevention of future occurrences.

entry.title: Re: Entry is not a valid supply chain unit (/SCWM/SHP_RCV)
entry.content:
Hi, 

The issue can come due to incorrect location master data in EWM system. Kindly check the note 2735601 - Entry is not a valid supply chain unit (/SCWM/SHP_RCV 058) - SAP for Me for details. 

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: SAP DBTech JDBC: [383] (at 38): invalid identifier: parameterized sql view USR_ATTR_ID without i
entry.content: Please give us information about what you're trying to do. How are you connecting? Which query are you running? Which client are you using?

entry.title: Re: Develop Powerful Analytical Queries using ABAP Core Data Services (CDS)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Mohn,

Sorry I didn't make all clear in the last reply. Query Browser app is only to preview queries created in Custom Analytical Queries app (CDS view name starts with YY1, or ZZ1), therefore queries created in ADT will not show up there. See https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/3a24b854ee8f8d21e10000000a44176d.html?locale=en-US

So the frontend to directly consume projection view created in ADT on S4 2023 is AO or SAC. 

At the same time, to access projection view query in SAC or AO, the better (recommended) way to setup authorization is to use S_START Authorization for INA1 Service, see  https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/bwplaolap/3956877110.html?locale=en-US

With this, the query don't need to set C1 released any more. The authorized queries in INA1 service will listed in AO or SAC open query box.

 

Best regards,

Giselle

entry.title: Re: India Localization Compliance Reports in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Sahil_Grover Thank you for sharing this article.

Regards,

Vignesh Avasarala

Presales Consultant

entry.title: Re: 403 forbidden error for XSUAA protected capm destinat...
entry.content:
Change your package.json to

"cds": {
  "requires": {
    "auth": {
      "kind": "jwt" //use jwt or xsuaa as value
    }
  }
}

See https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/authentication#strategies

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Solman Application for SAP Satellite...
entry.content: Dear Vera Jiang,

entry.title: When uploading bank statement in FF_5, the items got cleared on account incorrectly.
entry.content:
When bank statement is uploaded through FF_5, the items at subledger level are getting cleared incorrectly. The subledger posting is done for 135000 amount where it should not have done against it as the correct amount from the xml file was 134975. In spite of the 25 dollars difference, it is clearing against 135000. 

I have debugged and check the code, but not able to make progress with the issue. Any help is appreciated. Thanks!

entry.content:
Hi @SrinathGanesan ,

Thank you for sharing this article.

Regards,

Vignesh Avasarala

Presales Consultant

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is about combining the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to create full-stack applications. In this CodeJam, we will learn how to deploy and configure an instance of the SAP HANA Cloud trial, develop a multi-target application using SAP Business Application Studio and the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, and create a service layer and SAP Fiori UI that also includes SAP HANA native artifacts such as calculation views.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Monday, 7th April, 2025 from 09:00 to 16:00 IST.

We thank Mindset Consulting India for kindly hosting this event at Bengaluru. 

Event venue:

WeWork Galaxy, 1st Floor,
43, Residency Road, 
Shanthala Nagar, Ashok Nagar,
Bangalore 560025
Google Map Link: https://maps.app.goo.gl/49m8ygxdC7cQXfqQ9

The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructors are Developer Advocate @eshrinivasan @ajay_soreng 

There are essential pre-requisites that must be completed by every attendee before arriving at the event location. They are documented here:  https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-hana-exercises-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md#normal-prerequi...

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 35 attendees. Register here on this Community Event page by clicking the Yes button in the 'Will you be attending'? section.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: To access DI API while opening SAP Business One, which method should I use?
entry.content:
I'm trying to create an Add-On with C# for SAP Business One.

I've known that if the Add-On executed without SAP Application opening, I need to manually set company information to connect to the database. 

But if SAP Application is opening, I've known that we can use the connection from UI API and set it to DI API.

I've known 2 methods of it but not sure which method to be used and why it's more efficient.

Method 1

 

SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany = new SAPbobsCOM.Company();
string cookie = oCompany.GetContextCookie();
string connectionContext = oApp.Company.GetConnectionContext(cookie);
oCompany.SetSboLoginContext(connectionContext);
oCompany.Connect();

 

Method 2

 

SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany = (SAPbobsCOM.Company)oApp.Company.GetDICompany();

 

I've found that Method 2 is easier but not sure if there is any limitations or cautions on it.

Please enlighten me. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Table Logs
entry.content:
There is no generic logging on SELECT. Please add details to your question if you need more assistance.

I guess that the beginning of one possible workaround is to use temporarily the SQL trace (which only displays SELECT, not the values read).

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to compare multiple Roles Between Syst...
entry.content:
My preferred workaround is to download table AGR_1251 contents from both systems for the roles to check and compare them in a spreadsheet (fields: AGR_NAME, OBJECT, FIELD, LOW, HIGH, DELETED).

Similar for AGR_1252 (fields: AGR_NAME, VARBL, LOW, HIGH).

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Solman Application for SAP Satellite...
entry.content: Dear Vera Jiang, Thanks for your valuable reply. Could you please clarify the below queries also. Is SAP Solution Manager have any differences between the on-Permisses and Cloud Edition? Is SAP Solution Manager have multiple editions/versions to be Chosen in RISE with SAP and GROW with SAP and what are the difference between them? Thanks & Regards Srinivas V

entry.title: Re: 自开发Query报表能否实现单位或金额的汇总功能
entry.content:
是的,自开发的Query报表可以实现类似系统标准报表的汇总或合并功能。以下是实现方法:

  1. 使用"自定义分析查询"功能创建报表
  2. 在字段选择页面,选择需要汇总的字段(如销售量、贷项凭证数量等)
  3. 在显示页面,通过"添加计算度量"功能创建汇总字段
  4. 可以设置过滤器来限定汇总范围
  5. 使用拖拽功能将字段放置到行或列中进行数据汇总展示

具体可参考以下博客的实现步骤介绍：

如何创建自定义分析查询 - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Issues with PostgreSQL Connection in Crystal Reports
entry.content: You need to close crystal reports and restart your computer, some times crystal reports don't save the changes and don't read bbdd. I think this can help you ! Have a nice day.

entry.title: How to create PurRqs in ROH with heuristic SAP_MRP_001
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert

Is it possible to create PurRqs in ROH using SAP_MRP_001 in PP/DS?

SAP_MRP_002 states that you can do that, but I don't know where to find it.

What is the correct way to do this when I want to run MRP in PP/DS instead of MRPLive?

Heuristics for Production Planning - SAP Documentation

 

Nagase

entry.title: Re: 3 Decimal places for Data Migration in S4 Public cloud

entry.title: Re: how to stop migration cockpit long time running job
entry.content:
Hi @Renato2 ,

if waiting for 2 weeks or more is an option, then raise OSS ticket and sometimes they don't even know it. So the solution above from Lily is actually working and if carefully (!) applied does it's job (also in project implementation).

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Depreciation Area Settings
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support

I am writing to inquire about the depreciation area settings.

For tangible assets, we use the indirect method, while for intangible assets, we apply the direct method. However, as only one primary depreciation area can be designated, it is mandatory to assign the primary depreciation area set for the indirect method in the master data of fixed assets for intangible assets.

Is there a way to exclude this setting, or alternatively, to calculate depreciation for intangible assets using the direct method?

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your guidance.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: did you resolve the issue, As we face the same issue
entry.content:
Hi, 
the answer in regards of feedback of "approved or declined" workflow is to use the emails - I did not check if it works, but assume it does.
But I think, this doesn't make sense to have the notification for step in process and an email for another step in the same process... again it's just an influence that could help. BR Angela

entry.title: Re: Deposit' to 'Bill'
entry.content: Here Message "posting preview for this document did not result in a journal entry"

entry.title: EC Diagnostic Tool :SAP Successfactors Onboarding
entry.content:
This Blog was built together with @SanchayitaKundu and @Angela_Romano  .

As you aware Successfactors EC Team has introduced Diagnostic tool analysis for Succesfactors Module in 1H2024 Release. In this blog , we will cover how Diagnostic Blog can be utilized in Onboarding Module.

​This tool enables self-diagnosis and self-analysis of the complete data transaction and workflow processing in a single view, allowing customers or internal users to resolve issues independently and reduce resolution time.

​Supported Transaction Types:

  • Workflows
  • Centralized Services Save Actions
  • Snapshot View
  • Rule Execution View

​RBP to enable tool:

  • Administrator > Diagnostic Tool > Diagnostics Tracing Configuration
  • Administrator > Diagnostic Tool > Workflows Diagnostics Data
  • Administrator > Diagnostic Tool > Centralized Services Diagnostics Data
  • Administrator > Admin Center Permissions > Access Diagnostic Tool 

​

​Note:
We recommend creating a permission group to restrict access to this tool to only a few people/admins. This tool does not respect RBP access at field levels therefore the provided admins can see restricted employee's data. To avoid such issues or concerns please create a separate permission role for this access and give the access to few admins/users so that it can be easily monitored and controlled.

Save Action Transaction:

  • Snapshot View shows the snapshots or the records starting from the fields that were changed till the related changes, rules, end date corrections, forward propagation and final save action. In each stage a tabular data will be shown for all related cross-entities or sub-entities involved. We can compare the field changes in each stage to get an idea of which stage the field values changed.
  • Rule Execution view shows in detail all the records that were filtered out for rule execution with reason, all the rules that were filtered out with reason and all the rules that got executed with timestamp and details of the fields and it's values the rule changed. It gives functionality to search by rule ID or field ID for cases where several rules got executed.
  • After enabling the tool, the issue needs to be replicated and then the transaction trace is available for issue analysis.
  • Tracing will turn off after 15 minutes. The traced data will auto delete after 10 days.
  • The tool doesn't support MDF objects for now.
  • Only onSave rules data are captured.
  • Mass changes, API and imports save transactions are not traced.

Save Action Configuration: Business Action should be Onboarding.

  • In Manage Data, set up the Diagnostics Tracing Configuration MDF object.  You may also use the direct link in diagnostic tool page, where a link to "Enable Tracing" is provided.
  • In Diagnostic Trace Configuration, create new or modify existing trace, by entering any code, status= active and Activate Diagnostic Trace = Yes.
  • Enter user name of user completing the transaction in Requested By field (if using proxy enter that user's name). 
  • Requested For field doesn’t support external onboarding users yet

  • Save the object and then replicate the save action on a user.

  • Once this object is saved from the start time provided the tracing will be active for 15 minutes.

  • Within this time frame, any Save transaction executed by the requested user would be captured and available in the tracing details.

  • Business Action enlists all supported ChangeSources.

    • New Hire Data Review / Access New Hire Data / Personal Data Collection/Final Data Review /Hire Template with standard HRIS Element- Onboarding
    • Manage Pending Hires – Hire/Rehire Processes
    • Offboarding / RHDR Pages /MDF pages is not supported

    • For PDC page :

         A) if manager completed PDC on behalf of onboardee ,then we capture this transaction ? - Yes, since the 'Requested By' is an internal employee and searchable on the tool configuration.   
    •    B)If PDC completed by onboardee ,do we support transaction ? - Currently this information is not captured since 'Requested By' doesn't allow search of External Onboarding Users

Workflow Tracing:

  • The approval or actions on the workflow should be done only from "workflow details page".
  • If the workflows are approved from the "home page quick action" or "mobile device" or "Manage workflow requests" admin tool by taking action on the workflows by admin and changing workflow approvers or status, then such changes will not be traced. In the diagnostic tool for such scenarios only the initiate data with pending workflow status will be shown because other approval or send back actions was not traced.
  • Workflows tracing will start and keep capturing from the date the Role-based permission (RBP) is provided to the Diagnostic tool > Workflow Configuration Data. However, after 10 days of no action on the workflow the tracing data will get auto-deleted. If any action is done on the workflow like approval or send back, the tracing data will stay for + 10 days and so on.
  • Auto-approval or CC role workflows are supported.
  • Workflows based on HRIS Elements are only supported.
  • Workflow trace will be only if the workflow is actually submitted. No simulation tracing is available.

Workflow Tracing Transaction

Search fields for Workflow Tracing:

  • Requested By = user doing the transaction
  • Requested For = user whose data is getting changed in the transaction
  • Date Range = Workflow initiate date Or when the changes on employee was done/ issue replication date. At a time only 3 days can be selected and searched.

Thanks,

Gopinath M

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Stitching
entry.content:
Hi Vysak,
when using batching / stitching, there are special JS commands offered to enable page numbering across the different chunks. Or to cite the documentation:

"""
For all batch output, pages will be numbered consecutively across individual documents, but only when those
documents are rendered using the same template. That is, the first document will start at page one and the second document will continue where the first left off. To enable this, some settings in Designer must be set, as follows.
When designing the template, modify the default scripts for CurrentPage and PageCount as follows:
For CurrentPage, replace
xfa.layout.page(this) with xfa.layout.absPageInBatch(this),

which starts with 0; so if you want to use 1 as the first page, use:
xfa.layout.absPageInBatch(this)+ 1.

For PageCount (total page number), replace:
xfa.layout.pageCount() with xfa.layout.absPageCountInBatch()
"""

Best regards
Pascal

entry.title: Re: Operation UPDATE not supported for LO-H
entry.content:
Hi AustinKloske,

the Handling Unit OData API supports two kinds of Handling Units:
- LO HU (ERP HUs)
- EWM HU

The Handling Unit OData API supports the update of the HU header for EWM HU. But not for LO HU at the moment.

You can check the existing documentation for supported API operations
https://api.sap.com/api/OP_HANDLINGUNIT_0001/documents ->
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e1841426f60f4e50913ec9a64aba8332/9240f938e56542f3a2ceb3fce7c96cda.html

At SAP Customer Influence there is an existing request: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/273456.
If you want, you can vote for it.

As workaround you could use the existing remote Function Module BAPI_HU_CHANGE_HEADER for your purpose.

Best regards,
Barış Yalçın

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Solman Application for SAP Satellite...
entry.content: Dear Customer, The location of installation does not affect the functionality of the solution manager. Whether it is installed on-premises or in the cloud, the solution manager has the same capabilities. The main difference lies in who hosts the operating system and configuration. For more quesions about the RISE and GROW, please reach out to the sales and ECS team. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Problems with @Aggregation.default: #SUM
entry.content: HI,Did you slove your problem? Cause I meet the same problem ,i add @Aggregation.default: #SUM,@Analytics.query: true and @analytics.dataCategory: #FACT to the interface view, but I still do not get my total line in my RAP

entry.title: Request for Guidance on Resolving ChaRM Issue Post-SAP BW Migration to SAP S/4 HANA RISE with SAP.
entry.content:
Hello Solman and SAP Cloud Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

We have recently completed the migration of our SAP BW system to the SAP S/4 HANA system under the RISE with SAP initiative. As part of this transition, we are currently managing six SID entries for three systems with both the old (pre-migration) and new (post-migration) host names as follows:

  • ABC → before migration, ABC00001 → after migration
  • DEF → before migration, DEF00001 → after migration
  • GHI → before migration, GHI00001 → after migration

While the RFC connections for the pre-migration systems have been manually updated through transaction code SM59, pointing to the new hostnames in the S/4 HANA environment, the system entries in the LMDB still point to the old SIDs (ABC, DEF, GHI).

Moreover, we have encountered an issue when trying to release a Transport Request from the ABC system. The error message "ABC System not found" is being displayed, which indicates that the system is not properly recognized within the current configuration.

I would like to request your assistance in confirming whether I can proceed with the following solutions to resolve or mitigate this issue. Alternatively, if there are additional activities or steps that need to be carried out in such scenarios, I would greatly appreciate your guidance.

Scenario 1: Systems Already Migrated to SAP HANA Private Cloud/SAP2SKY with Existing RFC Connections Updated Manually in SM59 and New System Entries Updated in LMDB

Option A:

  1. Create new RFC connections for the new system entries (<D-SID>00001, <Q-SID>00001, <P-SID>00001) through Managed System Configuration. The following credentials are required from both systems as detailed in Screenshot-1:
    • <D-SID>00001 (Development)
      • SM_<D-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_READ
      • SM_<D-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_TMW
      • SM_<D-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_TRUSTED
      • SM_<D-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_LOGIN
    • <Q-SID>00001 (Quality)
      • SM_<Q-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_READ
      • SM_<Q-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_TMW
      • SM_<Q-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_TRUSTED
      • SM_<Q-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_LOGIN
    • <P-SID>00001 (Production)
      • SM_<P-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_READ
      • SM_<P-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_TMW
      • SM_<P-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_TRUSTED
      • SM_<P-SID>00001CLNT<Client no>_LOGIN
  2. Allocate the existing logical component group (<LCG_NAME>) to the new system entries (<D-SID>00001, <Q-SID>00001, and <P-SID>00001).
  3. De-allocate the logical component group (<LCG_NAME>) from the old system entries (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, and <P-SID>).
  4. Create a new phase cycle with the new systems (<D-SID>00001, <Q-SID>00001, and <P-SID>00001).
  5. If possible, decouple Transport Requests from the existing Change Document and Change Request (without releasing the Transport Requests).
  6. Create a new Change Request and Change Document with the new phase cycle.
  7. Reassign Transport Requests to the new Change Document.
  8. Test the connection by creating, releasing, and decoupling a dummy Transport Request (TR).
  9. Delete the old system entries (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, <P-SID>) and associated old RFC connections in the PUM system.

Option B:

  1. Allocate the logical component group (<LCG_NAME>) to the new system entries (<D-SID>00001, <Q-SID>00001, and <P-SID>00001).
  2. De-allocate the logical component group (<LCG_NAME>) from the old system entries (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, and <P-SID>).
  3. Rename the old systems (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, <P-SID>) to <D-SID>00002, <Q-SID>00002, and <P-SID>00002.
  4. Rename the new systems (<D-SID>00001, <Q-SID>00001, <P-SID>00001) to <D-SID>, <Q-SID>, <P-SID>.
  5. Reassign the updated systems (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, <P-SID>) in the phase cycle "<PHASE_CYCLE_NAME)" in the scope step and to the Build step.
  6. Test the connection by creating, releasing, and decoupling a dummy Transport Request (TR). If successful:
  7. Delete the old system entries (<D-SID>00002, <Q-SID>00002, and <P-SID>00002).

Scenario 2: Systems Already Migrated but New System Entries Not Updated in LMDB Due to Failed RFC Connection

  1. Deactivate SLD & LMDB Sync and rename the old system entries in SLD & LMDB from (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, and <P-SID>) to <D-SID>00002, <Q-SID>00002, and <P-SID>00002.
  2. Update RFC connections manually through Tcode SM59.
  3. Re-activate SLD & LMDB Sync to update and synchronize system entries in SLD & LMDB.
  4. Allocate the existing logical component group (<LCG_NAME>) to the new system entries (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, and <P-SID>).
  5. De-allocate the logical component group (<LCG_NAME>) from the old system entries (<D-SID>00002, <Q-SID>00002, and <P-SID>00002).
  6. Create a new phase cycle with the new systems (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, <P-SID>).
  7. If possible, decouple Transport Requests from the existing Change Document and Change Request (without releasing the Transport Requests).
  8. Create a new Change Request and Change Document with the new phase cycle.
  9. Reassign Transport Requests to the new Change Document.
  10. Test the connection by creating, releasing, and decoupling a dummy Transport Request (TR).
  11. Delete the old system entries (<D-SID>00002, <Q-SID>00002, and <P-SID>00002).

Scenario 3: Systems Ready for Migration to SAP HANA Private Cloud/SAP2SKY with No Open Change Requests/Change Documents

  1. Request the relevant team to close any open change requests/change documents before migration begins.
  2. Deactivate SLD & LMDB Sync and delete old system entries in SLD & LMDB (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, <P-SID>).
  3. Re-activate SLD & LMDB Sync to update and synchronize system entries in SLD & LMDB.
  4. Create new RFC connections for the new system entries (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, <P-SID>) through Managed System Configuration. The following credentials are required from both systems:
    • <D-SID> (Development)
      • SM_<D-SID>CLNT<Client no>_READ
      • SM_<D-SID>CLNT<Client no>_TMW
      • SM_<D-SID>CLNT<Client no>_TRUSTED
      • SM_<D-SID>CLNT<Client no>_LOGIN
    • <Q-SID> (Quality)
      • SM_<Q-SID>CLNT<Client no>_READ
      • SM_<Q-SID>CLNT<Client no>_TMW
      • SM_<Q-SID>CLNT<Client no>_TRUSTED
      • SM_<Q-SID>CLNT<Client no>_LOGIN
    • <P-SID> (Production)
      • SM_<P-SID>CLNT<Client no>_READ
      • SM_<P-SID>CLNT<Client no>_TMW
      • SM_<P-SID>CLNT<Client no>_TRUSTED
      • SM_<P-SID>CLNT<Client no>_LOGIN
  5. Allocate the existing logical component group (<LCG_NAME>) to the new system entries (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, and <P-SID>).
  6. Create a new phase cycle with the new systems (<D-SID>, <Q-SID>, <P-SID>).
  7. Create new Change Requests and Change Documents with the new phase cycle.
  8. Test the connection by creating, releasing, and decoupling a dummy Transport Request (TR).

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Regards

Srinivas V.

entry.title: Re: DTP failed because of cannot read from datastore object for record
entry.content:
hi experts i have faced the same situation however i got dtp failed at loading to infocube.as i shown below

my scenario 

Usage of Transformation Rule Type “Read from Datastore” to fill the field in info cube. i have flow like dso ZPURD10 --> cube ZXPURC03 and ZPURD07 is look up dso.

say KEY FIELDS in ZXPURC02 are DOC_NUM DOC_ITEM,

 DOC_NUM, DOC_ITEM in ZPURD06

  ZPURD10 :  0BBP_PO_ID
0BBP_POITEM,  then target field DOC_DATE in ZXPURC03 fill with

data from DOC_DATE field from ZPURD07

assigning this field DOC_DATE In info cube using rule type read from dso to load the data from zpurd06 to DOC_DATE                              why i am facing the issue and could please suggest me the error correction in this scenario.

 

 

Thanks and regards

VIJAY

entry.title: Re: How to create custom API for Talent Intelligence Hub data to integrate with downstream system(s)
entry.content: Thanks @Manojkumar07 !!

entry.title: Re: Understanding the Technology Behind SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) - Out of the box 'Insight App&&
entry.content:
Thanks, Venu for sharing the end-to-end picture.

My understanding is that the ETL process is handled internally within the Foundation Layer. However, if further transformations are required, would we need to leverage Databricks for such processing? As, I understand that SAP Datasphere primarily focuses on building analytical models on top of data products rather than performing transformations. 

Best Regards,

Dheeraj

entry.title: Re: Enabling Multiline Editing Capabalities in RAP
entry.content:
@Huiying Hello, thanks for your response,

I have done this in Cloud ABAP.

entry.title: Re: Adobe livecycle designer gives warning from SD_SDOC_F...
entry.content:
Hi,
seems like one of our colleagues has hardcoded the path to their xsd in the template.

This error message is harmless and you can circumvent it by supplying your own xsd file in the data connection in the template.

Best regards
Pascal

entry.title: Re: Is MB5B used in S4 Hana?
entry.content:
Hi @Metalone ,

I think it come with more powerful. Could you please see the below link, check with your tech team and let us know if further questions.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/how-to-enabale-alv-grid-display-in-mb5b-in-s4-hana/ba-p/13525242

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Cancel line item on a customer demand via SOAP
entry.content: Use actionCode='03' as you are trying to delete the line item

entry.title: Re: Unable to configure trusted RFC no matter what
entry.content: Dear Symon, A similar case I worked before was resolved by the RFC team by the following steps: 1. review and apply Note 3287611 - Bugfixes in Trusted/Trusting Migration in both the solman and managed ABAP system if it is valid. 2. proceed with the migration steps mentioned in this SAP Note 3157268 - How-To-Guide: Migration of Trusted/Trusting Relationships. Please try the steps. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Enabling Multiline Editing Capabalities in RAP
entry.content:
@Amit20 thanks for your comment,

Could you please refer the bellow link you will get more info.

RAP Generator SM30 Application in few clicks using ABAP Wizard

entry.title: Re: Budget Threshold Alerts for Cost Centers
entry.content: Hi Ana, Thanks for sharing this fantastic blog post! Unfortunately, we still have a 2SL Public Cloud, which means we likely don't have the developer extensibility options enabled at the moment. I'll look into it and reach out to our contact at SAP SE to see if this can be enabled. Best regards, Simon

entry.title: Transfer qty during Sales Order Settlement
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I am new in SAP CO .

Currently my project running Make To Order scenario using sales order.

I have a case that during SO settlement (VA88) to Margin Analysis, only Revenue and COGS value transferred to Margin Analysis.

The qty value not transferred during SO settlement.

Kindly need help from SAP experts in here how to solve this issue.

 

Thank you very much,

Hays

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hi @hariprasadgud 

Just want to let you know I raised an enhancement request to lift the limitation of downloading max 50 rules. We experience this to be an issue when we want to download the full configuration. Even downloading in multiple steps is not covering 100% of the rules.

Maybe you want to take a look?

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/343629

@visitors of this blog, if you experience the same limitation, you might want to vote?

Thanks,
Roos🌹

entry.title: How to link field to other table in PLD in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an UDF in ORDR table with the name of trade manager (aka ORDR.U_TrdM).

I have an user defined table "TRDM" with long list of trade manager's names and phone numbers.

How in PLD can I link TRDM.Phone to ORDR.U_TrdM and show the phone number of this specific trade manager? ORDR.U_TrdM field contains is exactly same value as TRDM.Name (I mean the name of the trades in ORDR is exactly the same name as in the TRDM table)

I have SAP HANA FP2108 version

Thank you in advance,

Marina

entry.title: Re: ISD-Input service distributor for distributing GST to multiple business places - In S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for the document on ISD. 

However we are facing issue while posting the transaction as we have activated document splitting functionality- it is giving the error for profit centre not filled in any of the line items as its a normal JV from 1 balance sheet to another balance sheet account and there is no option to enter the same.

Is there a solution for this ?

Regards
Chetan

entry.title: Available Material SAP 4/HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
I want to see the quantity of material available after any commitments. I can do it in the stock overview app but its by single material.

What I would like is a table showing the material, stock on hand, commitments and then what is available.   

If not in a view is there a CDS table that would show it? If so what is the CDS name.

entry.title: Harmonized Insights: Introducing Unified Customer Info Sheets for BTP Metrics
entry.content:
At SAP, we are committed to enhancing your user experience and providing seamless access to information that matters to your business. We are pleased to announce a step towards improving usage transparency. We have introduced Platform as a Service (PaaS) subscription metrics to our harmonized Customer Information Sheets. With this, all important metric information is now available in one place through the SAP Support Portal as well as directly in SAP for Me.

What this means for you

  1. Improved Access: All relevant metric information, including Cloud Platform Subscription Metrics, can be accessed directly through SAP for Me.
  2. Improved Transparency: Providing Customer Information Sheets for all of SAP’s public subscription metrics in a unified, streamlined format in one place reduces complexity and allows for a clearer and more comprehensive understanding of the metering logic and results.
  3. Improved Clarity and Confidence: The included instructions for independent verification of the measurement results will help boost confidence in our metering and reporting.

How to access your metric information

Getting started is easy:

  • SAP Support Portal: A list of all PaaS and SaaS Customer Info Sheets can be found on our SAP Cloud Subscription Usage page on the SAP Support Portal. The introductory text has been adjusted to include a link to search for historical documents (product-specific Supplements and Service Description Guides) in the archive, as well as a reference to the SAP Discovery Center, where descriptions for non-subscription offerings can be found.
  • SAP for Me:
    1. Log in to SAP for Me: Visit the SAP for Me portal and log in with your credentials.
    2. Navigate to Consumption: After logging in, navigate to the Consumption tab in the Finance & Legal section, where you will find all relevant metric information in the subscription context, including BTP PaaS metrics (often referred to as CP ###).
    3. Explore and analyze: Dive into the detailed Customer Information Sheets by clicking on the metric name or the link next to it to understand the metering, review the usage, and make informed decisions about your SAP subscriptions.

Elevate Your Experience with SAP for Me

SAP for Me is designed to be your digital companion for managing and optimizing your SAP solutions. With the harmonized Customer Information Sheets, we are taking another step towards delivering a unified, intuitive, and value-adding experience. We invite you to explore these enhancements and discover how SAP for Me can simplify and elevate your subscription management.

Further Information

Please use the ‘Feedback’ slider on the right edge of the SAP for Me page of the application to share your feedback with us.
Stay updated by subscribing to this blog and visiting the License Utilization Information Support portal.

SAP for Me is made for you!

entry.title: Re: impex and default value for usergroup
entry.content:
You should use the default modifier next to the uid attribute inside the parentheses. Therefore, your ImpEx header should be as follows

UPDATE Employee; uid[unique = true]; name; groups(uid[default = myUserGroup])[mode=append]; password[default = $defaultPassword]; sessionLanguage(isocode)[default=$defaultLanguage]; sessionCurrency(isocode)[default = $defaultCurrency]

entry.title: Re: 自开发Query报表能否实现单位或金额的汇总功能
entry.content:
Dear S0025917247 ,

自开发报表可通过设置打开汇总功能，如下图所示：

 

但单位不同则无法进行汇总，如下图所示：

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: Re: Is there a project plan for integrating Solution Mana...
entry.content:
Good morning, 

I guess you have read SAP Note 2640279 - GRC 10.x and GRC 12.0 installation on SAP Solution Manager

Best regards,

Dolores
